headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight Rating on Aon plc (AON)
summary: Aon plc (NYSE:AON) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In. On May 21, 2026, Morgan Stanley analyst Bob Huang lowered the firm’s price target on Aon plc (NYSE:AON) to $370 from $380 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares.
